rationale: Superseded by S-0034-07 (use primary DSI on t0024 as the t0033 optimiser substrate). t0034 established that primary DSI has measurable dynamic range on the AR(2) stochastic t0024 port (0.545-0.774 across a distal-length sweep, slope -0.126 p=0.038), so the fallback to vector-sum DSI is no longer necessary. Continuing to pursue vector-sum DSI as the t0033 objective would duplicate effort and could introduce a metric mismatch with downstream analyses that standardise on primary DSI.
